CustomField.description: Apex class name (without namespace) that implements the IApproverResolver interface. Only required when NextApproverSource__c = Dynamic. The class receives the record Id and returns a list of approver Ids (users or queues).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the Apex class name, for example: GridHOCApproverResolver. The class must implement IApproverResolver and be deployed to the org. Leave blank for NotRequired or UserInput steps.
CustomField.label: Approver Resolver Class
